arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle take on Aston Villa in a hugely exciting Boxing Day sparring match at St James’ Park. The two teams have upset the status quo to secure Champions League qualification over the last two seasons and each are targeting the top four again. Eddie Howe’s side are in fine form after reeling off successive 4-0 […] The post Newcastle vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: The five players Newcastle United could sign on a pre-contract agreement in January
arts.sum: ChronicleLive takes a look at five soon-to-be out-of-contract players who Eddie Howe could target in January: His club have looked at cashing in for the Canadian in January but David is likely to see out the rest of the season in France.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe offers Kieran Trippier update as Newcastle United transfer speculation lingers
arts.sum: When asked how Trippier can be kept motivated with a new role of squad player, not least after the near miss with Bayern, Howe told Chronicle Live: "I don't think anything is as clear-cut as that. Eddie Howe has insisted that Kieran Trippier remains a "valuable" member of his Newcastle United squad.

arts.ttl: How Tonali finally found his place at Newcastle
arts.sum: When Newcastle signed Sandro Tonali for £55m in 2023, they recruited one of the hottest properties in Italian football.

arts.ttl: Bruno Guimaraes not 'lying' as Newcastle United star makes feelings clear amid Man City talk
arts.sum: It has been a year dominated by links to Manchester City, but Bruno declared 'this is the team where I feel like home'. I feel like one of them so every time I play, I don't just play for Bruno or my family - I play for Newcastle United .

arts.ttl: Newcastle United squad revealed for Aston Villa as Howe ready for big call
arts.sum: Eddie Howe could have two huge additions to his squad for the Boxing Day clash with Aston Villa - and it comes at the perfect time for the Newcastle United head coach. After three wins over Leicester City, Brentford and Ipswich Town got the Magpies' season back on track, Howe knows they now face another tricky trio of games against sides which could be considered direct rivals for European places come the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Newcastle want injured 30-year-old to agree deal after Eddie Howe approval
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager, Eddie Howe, needs to improve his club’s Premier League position, and to that end is expected to be working alongside sporting director, Paul Mitchell, on deals during January, including one for an injured 30-year-old. Eddie Howe‘s Newcastle side have again flattered to deceive at times during the 2024/25 Premier League season. arts.ttl: Newcastle and Tottenham to battle European giants for €35m-rated talent wanted by nine other clubs
arts.sum: Decent centre-backs don’t come up for sale very often, so it’s no surprise to see up to 11 clubs wanted to do battle for PSG’s brilliant Slovak defender, Milan Skriniar. According to CaughtOffside sources with knowledge of Paris Saint-Germain‘s transfer plans, Milan Skriniar is set to be made available in the January transfer window for […] The post Newcastle and Tottenham to battle European giants for €35m-rated talent wanted by nine other clubs appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Aston Villa TV channel, live stream, kick off time
arts.sum: Newcastle United's return to Premier League form has come at the ideal time for Eddie Howe - but will face a tough test when Aston Villa come to St James' Park today. With away games at Manchester United and Tottenham to come, this is a big opportunity for Newcastle to show their credentials against their direct rivals after impressive displays against Leicester and Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Aston Villa: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Newcastle take on Aston Villa in the Premier League on Boxing Day. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.
